content.problemStatement:
Write a C program to demonstrate how a pointer can be decremented to move to the previous memory location. You will be given an array of integers and an index. You need to print the value at the given index and the value at the index before it using pointer decrement.


Input Format

The first line contains the size of the array `n`.
The second line contains `n` space-separated integers representing the elements of the array.
The third line contains an integer `index`.


Output Format

The first line should print the value at the given `index`.
The second line should print the value at the `index - 1`.
